publish_state: PUBLISHED (live hosted registry, listing resolves HTTP 200; remote publish succeeded)

hosted_harness.note: green after remote publish; remote publish requires >=1 negative/stop case, satisfied by crm-cleanup-readonly-stop (needs_agent).

dogfood.command: runx skill mamonisme/crm-cleanup@sha-1908e4534fff --registry https://api.runx.ai -i data_source_ref=external://graphql-compose-northwind/customers -i crm_export_ref=https://raw.githubusercontent.com/graphql-compose/graphql-compose-examples/master/examples/northwind/data/json/customers.json -i case_id=AROUT -i transcript='Customer has gone quiet, not returning emails, and said they are considering not renewing and might be moving away to a cheaper tool. Clearly at risk.' --json --approve-operator-context <digest> --receipts /tmp/dogfood79

takeaways.transport: append_event to crm_cleanup_decision aggregate; sealed_event_id sha256:51ce853a...

runx_verify_verdict: registry-signed (trust_state=trusted); local trusted-key verify env-limited, not a skill fault.
new_user_path: runx add mamonisme/crm-cleanup@sha-1908e4534fff ; then runx skill mamonisme/crm-cleanup@sha-1908e4534fff --registry https://api.runx.ai -i data_source_ref=external://graphql-compose-northwind/customers -i crm_export_ref=<export.json> -i case_id=<id> -i transcript='...' --json
